Dialog.name: MSG_SENDER_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nozomi Suemitsu[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you, cool kid. Your name was {f 4 2}-kun, right? Well, today's the day I'll finally treat you to a meal.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come to Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gourmet☆Friends?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I must say, I was blown away at the sight of you scarfing down your food! Every time I rewind that memory, my appetite just EXPLODES! {f 1 3 135}{f 1 3 135}[n]Come now, let us shake on our new friendship at Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}NICE☆RICE[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To my fellow foodie, who drifts in the same universe of flavor as I: it will soon be launch time.[n]{f 1 5 0}We take off @ Paulownia Mall NOW.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you H U N G R Y?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yes or Y E S?[n]{f 1 5 0}We are on an endless journey in a galaxy of zest and zing.[n]{f 1 3 148}{f 1 3 148}{f 1 3 148}{f 1 3 148}{f 1 3 146}Isn't that so?[n]{f 1 5 0}Now then... Come, to Paulownia Mall. ☆[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My heart has been thoroughly flambéed to a crisp! All I can do now is stress eat!!![n]{f 1 5 0}You better come join me right now, my dear gourmet friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Just between us[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall tell you the secret of life, but you shan't tell another soul...[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n] ↓[n]"Sticks and stones may break my bones, but carbs and fats will never betray me."[n]{f 1 5 0}You'll never betray me either, right?[n]{f 1 5 0}Come to Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}EMERGENCYYY!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's put the past behind us and talk it out like adults, shall we?[n]{f 1 5 0}Only because you're my No. 1 supporter and the best gourmet friend I could ever ask for, {f 4 2}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm in paradise today {f 1 3 145}[n]Turn up the heat! Let's get binging![n]{f 1 5 0}How do you feel about a high-calorie meal right now? {f 1 3 135}{f 1 3 135}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm sorry about the other day. But I really do want to eat another meal with you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}MEAT MEAT VEGGIE MEAT[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Welcome to the bottomless pit of hanger pangs. {f 1 3 135}{f 1 3 135}[n]Won't you join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fill in the blank: Eat like a __?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And the answer is... "EAT LIKE A GOURMET KING"![n]{f 1 5 0}You think you got what it takes? Then come on over![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We have an SOS here: Suffering of Starvation! {f 1 3 138}{f 1 3 138}[n]Gourmet friends, ASSEMBLE!!![n]{f 1 1}
